description_long: This is a large, round wheel of cheese with a pale, creamy white color and numerous small, irregular dark specks distributed throughout its body, suggesting the presence of herbs, spices, or mold cultures. A single wedge-shaped slice has been cut and slightly separated from the main wheel, revealing the same speckled interior. The cheese has a smooth, slightly matte surface with a few shallow pockmarks and no visible rind, giving it a uniform appearance from edge to edge. The cut surfaces are clean and straight, indicating a semi-soft to firm texture. There are no visible brand markings, packaging, or decorative elements present. The cheese rests directly on a flat, neutral surface with no additional context or serving items.
description: A large, round, pale cheese wheel with dark specks and a wedge cut out, showing a smooth, speckled interior and no visible rind.
description_view_0: Front view of the cheese wheel with a wedge cut out and placed slightly forward, showing the speckled surface and clean cut.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the wedge's front face and the main wheel's exposed interior, emphasizing the speckled pattern.
description_view_2: Rear view with the wedge positioned behind the wheel, showing the back and side surfaces with consistent speckling.
description_view_3: Side-rear view focusing on the cut section and the wheel's thickness, with the wedge set apart and the speckled texture visible.
